results.title: Review | Ardbeg 19-Year Traigh Bhan Batch 5 | Drams of Whisky
results.description: This rare small batch 19 Year Old Ardbeg is arguably the most tropical dram to leave the Distillery. Notes of fresh green peppers, smoked mango and guava ...

results.title: Ardbeg Traigh Bhan 19 Years Old Batch 2 Single Malt Scotch Whisky
results.description: Matured in American oak and Oloroso sherry casks, this sublime 19 year old whisky is the epitome of an aged Ardbeg. Non chill-filtered at 46.2% ABV.

results.title: Scotch Whisky Review #363: Ardbeg Traigh Bhan 19 Year Batch 3
results.description: This comes across as a young, super high peat level whisky. Probably under 10 years of age, probably 50-ish% ABV. Shot in the dark, but I'll guess Octomore 09. ...
